title: Entha Desathil Desthil Lyrics Priyamana Thozhi
stanzas:
Entha Desathil Desthil Song Lyrics Priyamana Thozhi
#SARajKumar #Hariharan

Entha desathil desthil
nee pirandhaai
ad ithanai perazha (2)

endhan swasathil swasathil
nee kalandhaai, ini
nee indri naan azhagaa

edho oru maattram
ennil ennil
yeno idai yaettram
yaettram idhayam thannil

nee kaal mulaitha pushpam
kadal nurayil
seitha sirppam
un munbu vandhu nindraal
andha sorgam kooda arpam
entha desathil ..

vanna vanna
poovelllaam vaasam
veesi poo pookkum
unnai pola ondrukkum
vaasaam veesaa theriyadhe

kodi kodi vaarthaigal
korthu kondu vandhaalum
nee sinungum oasai pola
artham edhilum
kidayaadhe..

o ..
Azhagae nee vaai pesa
geetham enbaene
sangeetham enbaenae

pesaatha mounathai
kavidhai enbaene
pudhu kavidhai
enbaene

kadal oram
veeyum vandhaal
puyal vandhadhendru
artham.

nee ennai neengi
sendraal
uyir nindradhendru
artham..
entha desathil ..

undhan kangal orathil
theetti vaitha
mai thandhaal
aindhu alladhainnooru
kaappiyangal
uruvaagum

undhan koondhal eerathai
thottu pona kaattraithaan
konja neram swasithaal
endhan vazhvil varamaagum.

o.o..
anbae un idhalaithaan
siraigal enbaene
pani siraigal enbaene

melithaana idaiyaithaan
piraigal enbaene
thaeip piraigal enbaene

adi anna paravai ondru
andru vazhndhadhaaga kaetten
naan kaetta andha ondrai
indru kangalaale paarthen.

Entha desathil desthil
nee pirandhaai
ad ithanai perazha (2)

endhan swasathil swasathil
nee kalandhaai, ini
nee indri naan azhagaa

edho oru maattram
ennil ennil
yeno idai yaettram
yaettram idhayam thannil

nee kaal mulaitha pushpam
kadal nurayil
seitha sirppam
un munbu vandhu nindraal
andha sorgam kooda arpam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and connection, highlighting the beauty of being together with a loved one.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Priyamana Thozhi.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented artist Hariharan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by S.A. Rajkumar.

When was this song released?

This song was released in the year 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Priyamana Thozhi, the song Entha Desathil Desthil serves as a poignant expression of love and longing. The lyrics convey a deep emotional connection between the lovers, evoking feelings of warmth and affection. Hariharan's soulful rendition, combined with S.A. Rajkumar's melodic composition, creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with anyone who has experienced love. This song beautifully encapsulates the essence of romantic moments, making it a perfect choice for weddings and anniversaries.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Entha Desathil Desthil from Priyamana Thozhi is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. With Hariharan's soulful voice and S.A. Rajkumar's enchanting composition, this song takes listeners on an emotional journey. Experience the magic of love through heartfelt lyrics penned by Pa Vijay, making this track a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: In which land were you born, that is such a great place? (2)
You have merged into my breath, now without you, I am beautiful.
There is some change in me, something is stirring in my heart.
The flower that bloomed at your feet, if it comes before you, even heaven will bow down.
In which land ..
All the colorful flowers are fragrant, but like you, no one else has a fragrance.
Even if you come with a thousand words, they won't have meaning like your sweet voice.
Oh beautiful one, when you speak, I call it a song, when I hear it, I call it music.
The silence that doesn't speak, I call it poetry, I call it new poetry.
When the sea breeze blows, it means a storm has come.
If you push me away, it means my life is standing still.
In which land ..
If your eyes give a glance, it will create a hundred beautiful stories.
If your curls touch the wind, for a moment, my life will become beautiful.
Oh my love, your beauty is like a flower, I call it a flower, I call it a flower.
The beautiful moments are like a song, I call it a song, I call it a song.
That is a bird that has flown away, I saw it with my eyes when I asked for it.
In which land were you born, that is such a great place? (2)
You have merged into my breath, now without you, I am beautiful.
There is some change in me, something is stirring in my heart.
The flower that bloomed at your feet, if it comes before you, even heaven will bow down.
